privileged_info_summary: This task creates a synthetic patient record for Jean DUPONT in a MedinTux medical database system. The document cr_cardio.pdf is a synthetic test file created during setup containing cardiology consultation text. All metadata values (patient name, document filename, document label 'Compte Rendu Cardio', and source path) are correctly specified and verified against setup and verification scripts.
